content.en:
When Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed significantly, a civil war broke out in the Devouring Realm.

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor and the White Deer Emperor Ancestor, the Blood Emperor Ancestor, the War Emperor Ancestor, and the Wanzhen Emperor Ancestor had a falling out, and even confronted each other.

"Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, you are crazy, you want to devour our Devouring Realm?"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor roared angrily.

"Why not, the Devouring Realm is also a world, once I devour it, I can be promoted to Domain Ancestor. At that time, it will be easy to destroy the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and when the time comes, I will only devour the origin of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and some other forbidden Void Realms will all be devoured by you, how about it?"

Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor proposed.

"No!" White Deer Emperor Ancestor said coldly: "The Devouring Realm is our home, the most important world for our Devouring Clan, and it must not be devoured. You're really a madman, you shouldn't have been let out in the first place!"

"Hahaha, shouldn't you let me out?If it weren't for me, the four of you would have died by now!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor despised the Dao.

"Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, do you really want to devour the Devouring Realm? You are doing this to be the enemy of our entire Devouring Clan, can you alone be able to compete with all of our Devouring Clan?" the White Deer Emperor Ancestor threatened.

"Four spicy chickens, just because you want to stop me, as for the other devourers, they are all ants!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor looked disdainful, and he didn't pay attention to the other Devouring Clans at all.

Immediately, he ignored it and entered the origin of the devouring realm, preparing to devour the origin.

At this time, the four Great Emperor Ancestors of the White Deer Emperor Ancestor, the War Emperor Ancestor, the Blood Emperor Ancestor, and the Wanzhen Emperor Ancestor joined forces to fight against the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor.

The Great War has begun!

How strong the strength of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor was, the other four Emperor Ancestors were too weak, they had almost no powerful means, and even if the four of them joined forces, they would not be able to resist the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor at all.

Of course, the four of them still had the secret treasures left by the domain ancestors, and once they were urged, they could burst out with powerful combat power, so they suppressed the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestors a little for a while.

Thundered!!!!

The battle between the two sides made the Devouring Realm tremble constantly, but as time passed, the combat power of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor was still strong, and the effect of the secret treasure of the Four Great Emperor Ancestors was completely maintained.

"Do you four think that you can kill me with the secret treasure given by the domain ancestors? Hehe, don't you know that I have created a forbidden dao technique that devours immortality, even if it is a move of the domain ancestor, don't even think about killing me, even if you four guys have the secret treasure, you can't kill me! Once your secret treasure is exhausted, you will be the one who will die!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor threatened coldly.

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor looked extremely solemn, what the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor said was right, once their secret treasure was useless, there would be no way to compete with the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor.

With the strength of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, I am afraid that he can easily defeat them.

As time passed, the power of the treasure became weaker and weaker.

In fact, the secret treasure is the origin stored by the domain ancestors, and the origin of the devouring clan is very close, so they can completely use the origin of the domain ancestors.

But if you are a cultivator, you can't use such a secret treasure.

But such a secret treasure also has limitations, once the origin is exhausted, the secret treasure is wasted.

At the beginning, the White Deer Emperor Ancestor had already spent a secret treasure in order to block the Wind Mountain Lord, and the secret treasure he used now was not as good as the last one.

Click!

The secret treasure of the Ten Thousand True Emperor Ancestor had exhausted the origin energy and was completely useless.

"Get out!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor condensed a forbidden spear, and with one spear, the Wanzhen Emperor Ancestor not far away was nailed into the void, and a single blow hit him hard.

Next up is three to one.

But soon, the secret treasure of the War Emperor Ancestor also ran out of origin energy, and was severely damaged by the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor's blow.

At this time.

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor knew that it could not be changed, and immediately said: "Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, we won't stop you, let's stop!"

"That's not going to get out of here!"

Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor said coldly.

Whoa!!

The Four Great Emperor Ancestors left one by one, and the other Devouring Clans of the Devouring Realm also left the Devouring Realm one by one, allowing the Frost Heavenly Emperor Ancestor to devour the origin of the Devouring Realm.

As time passed, the origin of the Devouring Realm became less and less, and the aura of the Devouring Realm became weaker and weaker, and a large number of spatial cracks appeared in the entire world, as if the world was about to be shattered.

One year!

Two years!

Three years!

In the tenth year, the Devouring Realm was finally devoured by the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor.

At the same time, the aura of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor swelled to a terrifying level.

Click!!

The body of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor itself shattered and began to reunite to form a domain body, and the devouring power on his body also began to transform into the devouring power of the domain ancestor level.

Everything is changing!

I don't know how long it has been, but the transformation of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor has been completed.

Since he was making a breakthrough in the Devouring Clan this time, rather than a breakthrough in cultivation, his strength had increased a lot after the breakthrough, and it was only a little stronger than the weak New Domain Ancestor, far inferior to most of the New Domain Ancestors among the cultivators.

This is also the limitation of being a devourer.

But if he was allowed to devour a world like the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, his strength could be greatly improved.

Therefore, as long as there is a world to devour him, his strength will continue to improve, and after a cultivator enters the domain ancestor, it will take a long time to get a little bit.

"Congratulations to the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor and the other devouring clans hurriedly congratulated.

"Humph!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor snorted coldly and stared coldly at the White Deer Emperor Ancestor and them, but he didn't kill them.

Once you kill these Devourers, he will be the only one left in the Devouring Clan in the future, and it won't make any sense, keep them as your little brothers, otherwise it will be too boring.

"Let's go, let's go and invade the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor ordered.

"Yes!"

Many devourers answered one by one.

Whew!!

All the Devouring Clans were dispatched, and followed the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

However, they didn't know how powerful Ye Tian was now, otherwise how would they dare to invade the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm!

It didn't take long for them to arrive at the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

And for the first time, the half-step domain ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm knew that the Devouring Clan had arrived.

And someone notified Ye Tian as quickly as possible.

The human world.

Ye Tian was in retreat to comprehend the Golden Silk Sacred Technique, and when he saw that someone was communicating himself, and the Terran was also communicating himself, he knew that something must have happened to the outside world.

So, he got out of the customs!
